package_type: public integrated package v5.7 - bulletproof inline header
limitations: Article 02 full body text is not fully embedded in this v1 structure package.
Chapter pages contain summary/key lines/source notes for design and navigation check.
Use Notion intermediate manuscript pages as source for full-text insertion in the next step.
changes_v1_1: Top page button text unified to 読む: 論考①を読む / 論考②を読む.
Header navigation simplified to 論考一覧 only.
changes_v1_2: Header brand display changed to the current site logo image.
Current logo image added as assets/site-logo.png.
Header navigation remains 論考一覧 only.
Top page buttons remain unified as 論考①を読む / 論考②を読む.
changes_v1_3: Header brand display reverted to text logo, not image.
Text logo styled as a two-line current-site-like brand display.
Header navigation remains 論考一覧 only.
Top page buttons remain unified as 論考①を読む / 論考②を読む.
changes_v1_4: Global font stack changed from Gothic/sans-serif to Mincho/serif.
Header text logo remains text-based, not image-based.
Typography letter-spacing adjusted slightly for Mincho readability.
Header navigation remains 論考一覧 only.
Top page buttons remain unified as 論考①を読む / 論考②を読む.
changes_v1_5: Top page hero GENAI-RON text size reduced.
Hero paragraph width and letter-spacing adjusted to avoid awkward wrapping.
Global Mincho typography retained but letter-spacing reduced slightly.
Header remains text logo, not image.
changes_v1_6: Hero body text max-width restriction removed.
Hero paragraphs now use the card width naturally instead of appearing left-biased.
Mincho typography and smaller GENAI-RON hero title retained.
Header remains text logo, not image.
changes_v1_7: Added a stronger CSS override for top-page hero GENAI-RON title size.
Hero GENAI-RON max size reduced to 2.25rem.
Hero Japanese subtitle inside h1 reduced to 0.82em.
Hero text width alignment fix from v1.6 retained.
Header remains text logo, not image.
changes_v1_8: Footer aligned to the same max-width and horizontal padding as the main content area.
Footer no longer sticks to the far left edge of the viewport.
Footer package generation text updated to 2026-05-20 JST.
Hero title size reduction from v1.7 retained.
Header remains text logo, not image.
changes_v1_9: Top page hero title split into hero-en and hero-ja spans.
Only GENAI-RON text is reduced in the hero.
Japanese hero title 🧠生成AI論🥦 restored to the larger original-like size.
Footer alignment fix from v1.8 retained.
Header remains text logo, not image.
changes_v2: Article 02 full text inserted into all chapter HTML pages.
Article 02 PDF generated and included in downloads/.
Article 02 PDF links enabled on home, article index, and article 02 top page.
Final UI adjustments from v1.9 retained.
changes_v2_1: Added left-side chapter table of contents to long article pages.
Article 02 pages include a sticky left sidebar with current chapter highlighting.
Article 01 pages in the package also receive the sidebar when present.
Mobile view uses a collapsible table of contents above the text.
changes_v2_2: Wrapped article page content in article-content container.
Sidebar and article content now occupy separate grid columns in the same row.
Fixed large blank space above article body caused by sidebar height affecting grid row height.
changes_v3: Imported 論考① full HTML pages from genai_ron_production_v7_taku.zip.
Added left side chapter menu to 論考① pages.
Kept 論考② full pages and left side menu from v2.2.
Added 論考① top page as article/state-change.html to avoid conflicting with article/index.html list page.
Updated top page and article list links to 論考①.
changes_v3_1: Removed internal scrollbar from 論考① left side menu.
Made 論考① side menu items slightly more compact.
論考② sidebar and PDFs unchanged.
changes_v4: Unified top-page read button colors for 論考① and 論考②.
Narrowed web reader width for both 論考① and 論考②.
Added downloadable PDF for 論考①.
Rebuilt both PDFs in Mincho-style typography with Abstract and two-column body layout.
changes_v4_2: Rebuilt 論考② PDF with a clearly redesigned layout.
Added dark vertical cover band, Abstract block, Contents page, running headers, and two-column body.
Kept HTML package contents from v4.1 except replacing the article 02 PDF.
changes_v5: Moved 論考① HTML pages into article/state-change/ folder.
Added redirect pages at old 論考① article/chapter-xx.html paths to avoid breaking old URLs.
Updated top page, article list, and sitemap links to article/state-change/.
Reviewed Notion design memo and aligned 論考② color handling with article-understanding-defense-action class.
Kept top page neutral and article 02 card in greige tone.
Kept Article 2 redesigned PDF from v4.2.
changes_v5_1: Rebuilt 論考① and 論考② PDFs with an embedded TrueType Ming/Mincho-like CJK serif font (AR PL UMing).
Avoided CID fallback that appeared Gothic in some viewers.
Kept two-column layout, Abstract, Contents, cover band, running headers, and page numbers.
Kept article/state-change folder organization and color review from v5.
changes_v5_3: Rebuilt 論考① and 論考② PDFs with a TrueType Mincho-style font instead of CID substitution.
Fixed tofu/square glyph issue visible in previous PDFs.
Preserved article/state-change/ folder organization and article color tone rules.
pdf_font: AR PL UMing TrueType Collection (embedded/subset by ReportLab)
changes_v5_4: Replaced v5.3 PDFs because they used UMingCN and produced tofu/square glyphs in Japanese text.
Restored PDFs generated by the earlier XeLaTeX/Noto Serif CJK JP pipeline that rendered Japanese without square glyphs.
Confirmed pdffonts shows embedded NotoSerifCJKjp-Regular and NotoSerifCJKjp-Bold subsets.
Kept article/state-change/ folder organization and site color review from v5.

changes_v5_5: Updated top/article-list/article02 headers to production-compatible header-inner / nav structure.
Added CSS override for production-compatible header layout.
Fixed top page greige article-card-defense class so it applies to article 02, not article 01.
changes_v5_6: Created cache-busted CSS files assets/style.v5-6.css and assets/style_article1.v5-6.css.
Updated HTML stylesheet links to the v5.6 CSS filenames.
Added inline critical header CSS to prevent header collapse even if old CSS is cached.
Kept article/state-change/ folder organization and v5.4 no-tofu PDFs.
changes_v5_7: Replaced all visible site headers with inline-styled production-compatible headers.
Header layout no longer depends on external CSS or browser cache.
Kept cache-busted CSS files from v5.6.
Kept article/state-change folder organization, article-specific colors, and no-tofu PDFs.
